subcodes.first_line: O handmaid of God! Patience and tranquility are among the characteristics of the maidservants of the All-Merciful. Make thou no haste, for verily God is with those who are patient [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امه الله صبر و سکون از خصائص اماء رحمانست تعجیل مکن ان الله مع الصابرات
subcodes.subjects: @acquiescence and resignation; contentment, @order; organization; tact; deliberation [tadbir], @spiritual transformation, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
